title: VibeCore
description: Lightweight performance and immersion pack featuring Sodium and Sound Physics Remastered
body:
VibeCore is a Vanilla+ modpack designed for Minecraft version 1.21.10. It's an excellent choice for players looking to boost their performance while maintaining the classic Minecraft experience.

This modpack focuses on refining various aspects of the game without adding any new blocks or ores. Instead, it enhances your gaming experience through improved performance, sound quality, and visuals.

## Key Features
**- Extreme Performance**  
Utilizing Sodium and VMP, VibeCore offers a considerable increase in FPS, ensuring a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay experience.

**- Immersive Audio**  
With Sound Physics Remastered, you’ll be treated to a more dynamic soundscape featuring 3D echoes and realistic reverb, making your environment feel more alive.

**- Visual Polish**  
The inclusion of Visuality adds extra particle effects, while Smooth Skies provides a seamless horizon, contributing to a more aesthetically pleasing overall world.

**- Essential Tools**  
Make the most of your gameplay with useful tools like Zoomify for an easy zoom feature, and Status Effect Bars for a more organized and efficient user interface.
